headline: HP, Intel, and Xerox Are All Chasing the Same Comeback. History Says Only One Survives
summary: HP, Intel, and Xerox all built the hardware world we grew up in, but the market now prices them as if they belong to different centuries. History offers a precise template for which kind of struggling giant survives long enough to matter again, and only one of these three fits it.

content.title: HP, Intel, and Xerox Are All Chasing the Same Comeback. History Says Only One Survives
content.summary: HP, Intel, and Xerox all built the hardware world we grew up in, but the market now prices them as if they belong to different centuries. History offers a precise template for which kind of struggling giant survives long enough to matter again, and only one of these three fits it.

headline: ServiceNow’s New IBM Partnership: A Real Catalyst, or Just Software-Selloff Noise?
summary: Earlier this month, ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) and IBM (NYSE:IBM) announced an expanded multi-year collaboration to make legacy enterprise systems “AI-ready,” integrating watsonx.data, Red Hat Ansible, Instana, HashiCorp Terraform and Vault, and IBM Bob into the ServiceNow AI Platform, with joint solutions expected in the second half of 2026. The pitch is serious. The market reaction, less so. ServiceNow ... ServiceNow’s New IBM Partnership: A Real Catalyst, or Just Software-Selloff Noise?

headline: IBM to Appoint Omnicom Media as Global Media Agency of Record
summary: Omnicom Media, an Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) Connected Capability, today announced it will be named global media agency of record for IBM following a competitive review. The appointment includes media planning and buying responsibilities across the Americas, EMEA, Japan and APAC regions.

headline: ServiceNow (NOW) Launches AI Cybersecurity Push With Accenture And Expands IBM Partnership
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) and Accenture have launched a new AI powered cybersecurity services offering and migration tool, targeting enterprise clients looking to tighten cyber controls and shift workloads to the ServiceNow platform. ServiceNow has expanded its multi year AI partnership with IBM to help integrate legacy enterprise systems, with joint AI driven solutions scheduled for release in late 2026. Both moves focus on high impact use cases for large companies, including cyber risk...
